name: Steps to Take After a Slip and Fall on the Job

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Slipping on a wet floor is embarrassing, but don't just brush it off. First, take a photo of whatever caused the fall before someone mops it up. Second, report it to your boss right away so there's a paper trail. Third, get checked out by a doctor, even if you just feel stiff. If the insurance company starts acting "shady," give us a call at 801-746-0290.

description: Steps to Take After a Slip and Fall on the Job - Murray
